chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.162 of 2024 Shabbir Ghani Ghafoor Kamani Versus Mst. Fatima Bai Kamani & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to non-prosecution of appeal as office objections Nos.10, 22 and 23 have not been complied with since 29.02.2024. Dated: 26.04.2024 None present. -.-.- By virtue of an order dated 24.01.2024 the application, which assailed an earlier order dated 29.09.2020, was found misconceived and abuse of process and cost of Rs.20,000/- was imposed keeping in consideration the order dated 29.09.2020. Today however neither appellant nor his counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending applications. Judge Judge
